changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES -- Tenant (uuid_generate_v4(), 'organization:read', 'organization', 'read', 'Read tenant organization'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'organization:update', 'organization', 'update', 'Update tenant organization profile'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'tenant_settings:read', 'tenant_settings', 'read', 'Read tenant settings'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'tenant_settings:update','tenant_settings', 'update', 'Update tenant settings'), -- Identity (uuid_generate_v4(), 'user:read', 'user', 'read', 'Read users'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'user:create', 'user', 'create', 'Create users'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'user:update', 'user', 'update', 'Update users'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'user:delete', 'user', 'delete', 'Delete users'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'role:read', 'role', 'read', 'Read roles'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'role:assign', 'role', 'assign', 'Assign roles to users'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'role:create', 'role', 'create', 'Create custom roles'), -- Catalog (uuid_generate_v4(), 'product:read', 'product', 'read', 'Read products'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'product:create', 'product', 'create', 'Create products'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'product:update', 'product', 'update', 'Update products'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'product:delete', 'product', 'delete', 'Delete products'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'price:update', 'price', 'update', 'Manage prices'), -- Inventory (uuid_generate_v4(), 'stock:read', 'stock', 'read', 'Read stock'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'stock:adjust', 'stock', 'adjust', 'Adjust stock'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'warehouse:manage', 'warehouse', 'manage', 'Manage warehouses'), -- POS (uuid_generate_v4(), 'pos:operate', 'pos', 'operate', 'Operate the POS terminal'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'pos:open_session', 'pos', 'open_session', 'Open a cash session'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'pos:close_session', 'pos', 'close_session', 'Close a cash session'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'pos:cancel_sale', 'pos', 'cancel_sale', 'Cancel a completed sale'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'pos:apply_discount', 'pos', 'apply_discount', 'Apply discount on sale'), -- Sales (uuid_generate_v4(), 'sale:read', 'sale', 'read', 'Read sales'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'sale:create', 'sale', 'create', 'Create sales'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'invoice:read', 'invoice', 'read', 'Read invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'invoice:issue', 'invoice', 'issue', 'Issue invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'invoice:cancel', 'invoice', 'cancel', 'Cancel invoices'), -- Customer (uuid_generate_v4(), 'customer:read', 'customer', 'read', 'Read customers'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'customer:create', 'customer', 'create', 'Create customers'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'customer:update', 'customer', 'update', 'Update customers'), -- Payment (uuid_generate_v4(), 'payment:read', 'payment', 'read', 'Read payments'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'payment:create', 'payment', 'create', 'Record payments'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'payment:cancel', 'payment', 'cancel', 'Cancel payments'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'credit:grant', 'credit', 'grant', 'Grant customer credits'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'credit:withdraw', 'credit', 'withdraw', 'Withdraw from customer credit'), -- Delivery (uuid_generate_v4(), 'delivery:read', 'delivery', 'read', 'Read deliveries'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'delivery:plan', 'delivery', 'plan', 'Plan deliveries'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'delivery:execute', 'delivery', 'execute', 'Mark deliveries as completed'), -- Expense (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:read', 'expense', 'read', 'Read expenses'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:create', 'expense', 'create', 'Create expenses'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:approve', 'expense', 'approve', 'Approve expenses'), -- HR (uuid_generate_v4(), 'employee:read', 'employee', 'read', 'Read employees'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'employee:manage', 'employee', 'manage', 'Manage employees'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'salary:manage', 'salary', 'manage', 'Manage salaries'), -- Reporting (uuid_generate_v4(), 'report:view', 'report', 'view', 'View reports'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'report:export', 'report', 'export', 'Export reports'), -- Audit (uuid_generate_v4(), 'audit:read', 'audit', 'read', 'Read audit log');
